chapter_title: Use of student resource package funding to purchase, hire or charter a school bus
snippet: Student Resource Package (SRP) funds must not be used for the following procurement activities: In exceptional cases, SRP funds may be used for the above activities. For example: School councils must seek specific regional director for the use of SRP in such exceptional cases, and the bus must only be used for its documented/approved purpose. School chartered bus services Includes information on school chartered bus services Resources Includes resources to support this topic Includes information on the use of student resource package funding to purchase, hire or charter a school bus Reviewed 24 October 2022
